modmenu.descriptionTranslation.random-cr: Let's randomize crafts for each world! Let the chaos begin...
gamerule.randomizeCrafts.description: Randomizes all crafting recipes when the world is created
gamerule.rcBalancedTiers.description: Recipes will be generated according to tiers (levels) to ensure game balance. Disabling this rule will make the game more hardcore!
gamerule.rcExcludeColorBlocks.descriptio: Colored variants (wool, glass, concrete, etc.) will not be used as ingredients.
gamerule.rcExcludeToolsArmor.description: Tools and armor will not be used as ingredients in recipes.
gamerule.rcExcludeFunctionalBlocks.descr: Crafting tables, furnaces and other functional blocks will not be used as ingredients.
gamerule.rcTierSpread.description: [1-20] Higher values increase the chance that end-game items will require basic materials. Only works when 'Balanced Tiers' is enabled.
message.random_crafts.generate_started: [Random Crafts] Cleaning up and reloading base recipes... Please wait.
message.random_crafts.generate_success: [Random Crafts] Successfully generated recipes with seed: %s! Reloading world...
message.random_crafts.clear: [Random Crafts] RandomCrafts disabled and cleared. Reloading...
message.random_crafts.no_active: [Random Crafts] RandomCrafts is not active in this world.
message.random_crafts.rule_changed: [Random Crafts] Gamerule %s has been changed. Use /rc generate to apply changes.
